untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of multi-timeframe pattern completion (double top/bottom, trendline rejection on HTF), parabolic exhaustion identification, and rejection candle recognition on LTF. These require pattern recognition and multi-timeframe context logic not expressible with single-bar indicator comparisons. Specific thresholds for timeframe_ratio, parabolic_lookback_bars, rejection_proximity_atr_multiple, and risk_per_trade_pct are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be determined. No indicators exist for pattern detection or cross-timeframe alignment validation.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: low volatility regime (atr < hvol_20) as entry guard. Exit conditions use swing rejection logic (close beyond prior bar extremes). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per source. Full implementation requires custom pattern detection functions outside allowed indicator set. Recommend implementing as multi-timeframe rules engine with pattern scanner rather than single-frame indicator rules.
